## Title 

Manage Facility Inventory

## User Story

**As an** admin

**I want** to manage the list of sports facilities

**So that** I can keep inventory updated and accurate

## Story Points

5

## Tasks

- [ ] Create CRUD operations for facilities
- [ ] Connect database (SQLite3)
- [ ] Add validation for facility inputs

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Admin can add, edit, and delete facilities
- [ ] Changes reflect immediately in the system

## Given / When / Then

**Given** the admin accesses facility management,

**when** they update a facility,

**then** the system reflects the changes.

## Validation and Evidence

**Validation method**
CRUD testing

**Related repository evidence**
docs/facilities.md
